Defines display parameters and orientation constants for the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This C header file defines several preprocessor macros related to display configuration and orientation. It specifies the dimensions of a display with `DISP_COLS` set to 200 columns and `DISP_ROWS` set to 228 rows. The macro `DISPLAY_FRAMEBUFFER_BYTES` calculates the total number of bytes in the display framebuffer by multiplying the number of columns and rows. The file also defines macros for different display orientations, such as `DISPLAY_ORIENTATION_COLUMN_MAJOR_INVERTED`, `DISPLAY_ORIENTATION_ROTATED_180`, `DISPLAY_ORIENTATION_ROW_MAJOR`, and `DISPLAY_ORIENTATION_ROW_MAJOR_INVERTED`, each assigned a specific integer value. Additionally, it includes macros for display types and properties, such as `PBL_BW`, `PBL_RECT`, `PBL_ROUND`, and `PBL_COLOR`, which are used to configure the display characteristics.
